Privacy Policy

This page explains how ADHD Focus Timer handles your data.

Local Storage

All focus records, Idea Fridge content, and preferences are stored in your device's local browser storage. We do not upload any data to servers.

No Cloud Required

This app runs completely offline without an internet connection. All data exists only on your device.

No Account Required

No registration, email, or personal information is needed to use this app. Open and start using immediately.

Idea Fridge

Text and voice notes stored in Idea Fridge are saved locally only. Once your mind has let go of these thoughts, you can delete them anytime.

Data Control

You can delete all local storage by clearing your browser data. We have no access to this data.

Contact Us

If you have any questions about this privacy policy, feel free to reach out through the contact page.
